'''ngodharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equal|equal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equal|equal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngodharaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodharithi|ngodharithi]] || [[word:ngodhariji|ngodhariji]] || [[word:ngodharishi|ngodharishi]] || [[word:ngodhariki|ngodhariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodharuthuthu|ngodharuthuthu]] || [[word:ngodharujuju|ngodharujuju]] || [[word:ngodharushushu|ngodharushushu]] || [[word:ngodharukuku|ngodharukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodharuthu|ngodharuthu]] || [[word:ngodharuju|ngodharuju]] || [[word:ngodharushu|ngodharushu]] || [[word:ngodharuku|ngodharuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodharufthuf|ngodharufthuf]] || [[word:ngodharufjuf|ngodharufjuf]] || [[word:ngodharufshuf|ngodharufshuf]] || [[word:ngodharufkuf|ngodharufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodharethe|ngodharethe]] || [[word:ngodhareje|ngodhareje]] || [[word:ngodhareshe|ngodhareshe]] || [[word:ngodhareke|ngodhareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodharothotho|ngodharothotho]] || [[word:ngodharojojo|ngodharojojo]] || [[word:ngodharoshosho|ngodharoshosho]] || [[word:ngodharokoko|ngodharokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodharotho|ngodharotho]] || [[word:ngodharojo|ngodharojo]] || [[word:ngodharosho|ngodharosho]] || [[word:ngodharoko|ngodharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodharofthof|ngodharofthof]] || [[word:ngodharofjof|ngodharofjof]] || [[word:ngodharofshof|ngodharofshof]] || [[word:ngodharofkof|ngodharofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfthĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfjĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfshĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngodharĂŻfkĂŻf|ngodharĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngodharĂŠthĂŠ|ngodharĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngodharĂŠjĂŠ|ngodharĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngodharĂŠshĂŠ|ngodharĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngodharĂŠkĂŠ|ngodharĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngodharathatha|ngodharathatha]] || [[word:ngodharajaja|ngodharajaja]] || [[word:ngodharashasha|ngodharashasha]] || [[word:ngodharakaka|ngodharakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngodharatha|ngodharatha]] || [[word:ngodharaja|ngodharaja]] || [[word:ngodharasha|ngodharasha]] || [[word:ngodharaka|ngodharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngodharafthaf|ngodharafthaf]] || [[word:ngodharafjaf|ngodharafjaf]] || [[word:ngodharafshaf|ngodharafshaf]] || [[word:ngodharafkaf|ngodharafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngodharasha|ngodharasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodharshĂ«asha|ngodharshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodharroasha|ngodharroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodharmuasha|ngodharmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodharyaasha|ngodharyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodharnkshĂ«asha|gongodharnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodharnkroasha|gongodharnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodharnkmuasha|gongodharnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodharnkyaasha|gongodharnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngodhadharasha|ngodhadharasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodhadharshĂ«asha|ngodhadharshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodhadharroasha|ngodhadharroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodhadharmuasha|ngodhadharmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodhadharyaasha|ngodhadharyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodhadharnkshĂ«asha|gongodhadharnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodhadharnkroasha|gongodhadharnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodhadharnkmuasha|gongodhadharnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodhadharnkyaasha|gongodhadharnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngedhĂŠrasha|ngedhĂŠrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠrshĂ«asha|ngedhĂŠrshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠrroasha|ngedhĂŠrroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠrmuasha|ngedhĂŠrmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngedhĂŠryaasha|ngedhĂŠryaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠrnkshĂ«asha|gongedhĂŠrnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠrnkroasha|gongedhĂŠrnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠrnkmuasha|gongedhĂŠrnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongedhĂŠrnkyaasha|gongedhĂŠrnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngodhfarasha|ngodhfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngodhfarshĂ«asha|ngodhfarshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngodhfarroasha|ngodhfarroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngodhfarmuasha|ngodhfarmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngodhfaryaasha|ngodhfaryaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongodhfarnkshĂ«asha|gongodhfarnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongodhfarnkroasha|gongodhfarnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongodhfarnkmuasha|gongodhfarnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongodhfarnkyaasha|gongodhfarnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
